src_raw: 2022年伊始，全球經濟環境一片暗淡。新冠病毒變異株Omicron肆虐，令全球經濟增長繼續受壓，通脹壓力亦持續上升。其後俄羅斯與烏克蘭爆發衝突，進一步推高通脹壓力，導致各主要央行採取前置式貨幣緊縮政策，擴大環球金融市場的波動，並加劇經濟增長放緩的風險。本地方面，第五波疫情爆發，感染個案急速上升，亦進一步打擊經濟。同時，圍繞防疫措施與檢疫限制的負面報道，更令外界對香港產生誤解，威脅香港作為國際金融中心的聲譽。全年計，香港實質本地生產總值收縮了3.5%。
mt_raw: At the outset of 2022, the global economic environment was bleak. The Omicron variant of COVID-19 was rampant, continuing to weigh on global economic growth and driving inflationary pressures ever higher. Subsequently, the outbreak of conflict between Russia and Ukraine further exacerbated inflation, prompting major central banks to adopt pre-emptive monetary tightening policies. This increased volatility in global financial markets and heightened the risk of an economic slowdown. Locally, the fifth wave of the pandemic saw a rapid surge in infections, dealing another blow to the economy. At the same time, negative reports surrounding anti-epidemic measures and quarantine restrictions led to misunderstandings about Hong Kong, threatening its reputation as an international financial centre. For the year as a whole, Hong Kong’s real GDP contracted by 3.5%.

terms: {'國際金融領袖投資峰會': 'Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit'}
src_raw: 儘管面對重重挑戰，金管局繼續致力保障香港貨幣與金融穩定，並於主要策略範疇推進多項有利發展的措施，進一步鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位。經歷3年的旅遊限制後，我們成功向國際社會展示香港已全面復常，旅客亦能再次親身訪港體驗。金管局在去年11月舉辦「國際金融領袖投資峰會」，來自世界各地的金融領袖親身來港出席。外界如此熱烈的反應，成為印證香港全面復常最好不過的證明。
mt_raw: Despite these formidable challenges, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) remained committed to safeguarding Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability, and advanced a range of initiatives in key strategic areas to further consolidate Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. After three years of travel restrictions, we successfully demonstrated to the international community that Hong Kong had fully returned to normal, and visitors could once again experience the city in person. In November last year, the HKMA hosted the International Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit, which saw financial leaders from around the world attend in person. The enthusiastic response from the international community was the best possible testament to Hong Kong’s full resumption of normalcy.

src_raw: 展望未來，外圍環境仍然充滿前所未有的不確定性。儘管如此，內地經濟重啟會為香港以至整個地區重新注入動力。金管局將繼續緊守崗位，履行維持香港貨幣與銀行體系穩定的職能，並積極尋求更多有利香港發展的機會，展現及提升香港作為國際金融中心的競爭力。我們亦會繼續為提升全球氣候應變能力及可持續發展出力。今年除《二零二二年年報》外，我們會另外發表《二零二二年可持續發展報告》，以便更詳細地介紹金管局在提升香港作為綠色和可持續金融樞紐的地位所進行的各項工作，以及金管局作為負責任投資者及可持續機構所作出的努力。
mt_raw: Looking ahead, the external environment remains fraught with unprecedented uncertainty. Nevertheless, the reopening of the Mainland economy will inject renewed impetus into Hong Kong and the wider region. The HKMA will continue to stay steadfast at its post, fulfilling its role in maintaining the stability of Hong Kong’s monetary and banking systems, while actively seeking further opportunities to benefit Hong Kong’s development and enhance its competitiveness as an international financial centre. We will also continue to contribute to strengthening global climate resilience and sustainable development. In addition to the 2022 Annual Report, we will also publish the 2022 Sustainability Report this year, to provide a more detailed account of the HKMA’s efforts to enhance Hong Kong’s position as a green and sustainable finance hub, as well as our work as a responsible investor and sustainable institution.

terms: {'匯率': 'exchange value', '港元': 'HKD', '美國聯邦儲備局': 'US Federal Reserve', '聯儲局': 'Fed', '聯匯制度': 'LERS', '聯邦儲備局': 'Federal Reserve'}
src_raw: 聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）自1983年實施至今，歷經多個經濟周期，成功抵禦各種各樣的外來衝擊。2022年再次見證聯匯制度的抗震能力。在美國聯邦儲備局（聯儲局）大幅收緊貨幣政策下，弱方兌換保證於2022年5月至11月期間被觸發41次，金管局按照既定機制，以有序及具透明度的方式從市場買入合共2,421億港元。其間港元匯率及貨幣市場繼續運作暢順，反映聯匯制度穩健有效。
mt_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS), implemented since 1983, has weathered multiple economic cycles and successfully withstood a variety of external shocks. In 2022, the resilience of the LERS was once again demonstrated. Amid aggressive monetary tightening by the US Federal Reserve, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 41 times between May and November 2022. In accordance with established mechanisms, the HKMA purchased a total of HK$242.1 billion from the market in an orderly and transparent manner. During this period, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate and money market continued to function smoothly, reflecting the robustness and effectiveness of the LERS.

terms: {'國際貨幣基金組織': 'International Monetary Fund', '基金組織': 'IMF', '對外部門報告': 'External Sector Report', '聯匯制度': 'LERS'}
src_raw: 這份對聯匯制度的信心，來自於建立多年的穩固根基。正如國際貨幣基金組織在其《2022年對外部門報告》中重申，聯匯制度的公信力建基於多項因素，包括具高透明度的運作規則、充裕的外匯儲備、審慎的財政制度、穩健的金融監管，以及靈活的經濟結構。
mt_raw: Confidence in the LERS is underpinned by a solid foundation built over many years. As reiterated by the International Monetary Fund (IMF) in its 2022 External Sector Report, the credibility of the LERS is based on several factors, including highly transparent operating rules, ample foreign exchange reserves, a prudent fiscal system, robust financial regulation, and a flexible economic structure.

src_raw: 我們深信除了穩健的機制外，致力與公眾及市場溝通以加深其對聯匯制度的了解、進行有效的市場監察，以及就不同情景作出應變計劃，均有助鞏固各界對聯匯制度的信心。我們就聯匯制度運作機制推出的社交媒體宣傳活動，有助在年內弱方兌換保證多次被觸發的情況下，有效維護市場對聯匯制度的信心。內部方面，金管局亦善用數據分析技術加強市場監察，讓我們能適時回應最新市場形勢。
mt_raw: We firmly believe that, in addition to a sound mechanism, efforts to communicate with the public and the market to deepen understanding of the LERS, effective market surveillance, and contingency planning for different scenarios all help to reinforce confidence in the system. Our social media campaigns explaining the operation of the LERS helped maintain market confidence during the year, even as the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered multiple times. Internally, the HKMA also leveraged data analytics technology to strengthen market surveillance, enabling us to respond promptly to the latest market developments.

terms: {'法定最低要求': 'statutory minimum requirements', '流動性': 'liquidity positions', '特定分類貸款比率': 'classified loan ratio', '資本充足': 'capital adequacy', '資本充足比率': 'capital ratio', '資產質素': 'asset quality'}
src_raw: 年內，儘管面對宏觀層面的挑戰以及遞增的信用風險，香港銀行體系仍然維持穩健，資本及流動性均非常充裕。2022年底，本地銀行的綜合總資本充足比率為20.1%，遠高於國際最低要求的8%。2022年第4季，大型銀行的流動性覆蓋比率稍升至162.3%，亦遠高於法定最低要求的100%。鑑於信貸環境面對挑戰，銀行體系的資產質素略為轉差，特定分類貸款比率於2022年底升至1.38%，但有關水平仍屬穩健，並低於2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。
mt_raw: During the year, despite macro-level challenges and rising credit risk, Hong Kong’s banking system remained sound, with strong capital and liquidity positions. At the end of 2022, the consolidated total capital adequacy ratio of local banks stood at 20.1%, well above the international minimum requirement of 8%. In the fourth quarter of 2022, the liquidity coverage ratio of major banks edged up to 162.3%, also well above the statutory minimum of 100%. Given the challenging credit environment, the asset quality of the banking system deteriorated slightly, with the classified loan ratio rising to 1.38% at end-2022. However, this level remains healthy and below the long-term average of 1.8% since 2000.

src_raw: 過去一年面對的一項主要監管挑戰，是在第五波新冠疫情後經濟仍充滿不確定性之下，確保銀行繼續為客戶提供所需支援的同時，維持穩健的信用風險管理。「預先批核還息不還本」計劃進一步展期，並加入自願性部分本金還款選項，讓借款人可以選擇開始償還部分本金，協助客戶就最終回復正常還款作好準備。
mt_raw: One of the main regulatory challenges over the past year was ensuring that banks continued to provide necessary support to customers amid ongoing economic uncertainty following the fifth wave of COVID-19, while maintaining sound credit risk management. The Pre-approved Principal Moratorium Scheme was further extended, with the addition of a voluntary partial principal repayment option, allowing borrowers to begin repaying part of the principal and helping customers prepare for a full return to normal repayment.

terms: {'壓力測試': 'Stress-testing', '年金': 'annuity', '承擔': 'Commitments', '流動性': 'liquidity positions'}
src_raw: 因應主要經濟體大幅收緊貨幣政策令市場波動加劇，2022年金管局另一項主要監管工作是加強監察銀行的市場及流動性風險承擔。我們深入評估各經濟體同步收緊貨幣政策對銀行可能產生的影響，並就壓力測試引入新情景，以評估銀行應對長時間流動性壓力的韌性。
mt_raw: In response to heightened market volatility caused by significant monetary tightening by major economies, another key supervisory focus of the HKMA in 2022 was to strengthen the monitoring of banks’ market and liquidity risk exposures. We conducted in-depth assessments of the potential impact on banks arising from synchronized monetary tightening across economies, and introduced new scenarios in our stress testing to evaluate banks’ resilience to prolonged liquidity stress.

terms: {'監管指引': 'supervisory guidance', '運作穩健': 'operational resilience', '運作穩健性': 'operational resilience', '運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力': 'operational and cyber resilience'}
src_raw: 與此同時，我們繼續採取具前瞻性的措施，促進在多個範疇的有效風險管理。在運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力方面，我們提供指引協助銀行制定綜合及全面的運作架構，以達致穩健經營，並就銀行具體的運作範疇提供詳盡監管指引，例如因應雲端技術普及而就使用雲端運算提供指引。此外，因應數碼化加速發展，我們亦加強了應對「網絡釣魚」騙案和推進消費者及投資者保障的工作。
mt_raw: At the same time, we continued to adopt forward-looking measures to promote effective risk management across multiple areas. In terms of operational resilience and cyber defense capabilities, we provided guidance to assist banks in establishing comprehensive and integrated operational frameworks to ensure sound operations, and issued detailed supervisory guidance on specific operational areas, such as the use of cloud computing in light of the growing adoption of cloud technology. Furthermore, in response to the accelerated pace of digitalization, we also enhanced our efforts to combat phishing scams and advance consumer and investor protection.

terms: {'內地銀行戶口': 'Mainland accounts', '分行及自助銀行服務設施': 'branch and self-service facilities'}
src_raw: 除了維持銀行體系穩健外，金管局亦致力推動普及金融及提高銀行服務的便利性。銀行對於金管局就提供基本銀行服務的呼籲反應正面，有銀行在新發展地區的大型公共屋邨增設分行及自助銀行服務設施。受到疫情相關的旅遊限制影響，許多香港市民無法使用其內地銀行戶口。有見及此，金管局與有關各方緊密合作，協助重新啓動約50萬個內地銀行戶口，受影響戶口持有人無需親身前往內地辦理。
mt_raw: In addition to maintaining the robustness of the banking system, the HKMA is also committed to promoting financial inclusion and enhancing the accessibility of banking services. Banks have responded positively to the HKMA’s call to provide basic banking services, with some opening new branches and installing self-service banking facilities in large public housing estates in newly developed districts. Due to pandemic-related travel restrictions, many Hong Kong residents were unable to access their Mainland bank accounts. In view of this, the HKMA worked closely with relevant parties to help reactivate around 500,000 Mainland bank accounts, allowing affected account holders to complete the process without having to travel to the Mainland in person.

terms: {'從業員': 'practitioners', '提升及再培訓': 'upskilling and reskilling', '提升專業能力': 'capacity building', '連接人才與未來': 'Connecting Talent to the Future'}
src_raw: 另一個對銀行業持續發展具策略重要性的範疇是提升專業能力。為擴展業務，銀行業對專業人才的需求仍然龐大。金管局在其人才發展策略 — 「連接人才與未來」— 的基礎上，在過去一年推出多項措施，協助銀行業吸引、培育及挽留人才，集中提升及再培訓現有從業員的技能，以及培育年輕一代，以建立可持續的人才庫。
mt_raw: Another strategically important area for the sustainable development of the banking industry is the enhancement of professional capabilities. To expand their businesses, banks continue to have a strong demand for professional talent. Building on its talent development strategy—Connecting Talent to the Future—the HKMA launched a number of initiatives over the past year to help the banking sector attract, nurture, and retain talent, with a focus on upskilling and reskilling existing practitioners and cultivating the younger generation to build a sustainable talent pool.

terms: {'8號颱風訊號': 'No. 8 typhoon signal', '國際金融領袖投資峰會': 'Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit'}
src_raw: 實施多時的疫情相關旅遊限制於2022年逐步撤銷，我們作出了多方面的努力讓香港重回國際舞台。11月舉行的「國際金融領袖投資峰會」吸引超過200位來自環球金融機構的國際及地區負責人親臨香港，並獲得全球各地的關注及熱切迴響。儘管峰會舉行日期不巧遇上50年來首個在11月份發出的8號颱風訊號，峰會仍然十分成功，向世界傳遞了香港已全面復常並正展現無比朝氣與活力的有力訊息。我們很高興看到峰會產生了正面的漣漪效應，不少環球金融機構及國際組織現正或計劃在香港舉辦各類活動。
mt_raw: Pandemic-related travel restrictions, which had been in place for some time, were gradually lifted in 2022. We made concerted efforts to bring Hong Kong back onto the international stage. The International Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit held in November attracted over 200 international and regional leaders from global financial institutions to Hong Kong, garnering worldwide attention and enthusiastic responses. Despite the summit coinciding with the first No. 8 typhoon signal issued in November in 50 years, it was a great success, sending a strong message to the world that Hong Kong had fully returned to normal and was brimming with vitality and dynamism. src_raw: 最後，我們在擁抱金融創新和它帶來的好處的同時，亦明白有必要監察及處理好相關發展可能帶來的風險。我們正密切注視虛擬資產領域的發展，並參與相關監管事宜的國際討論。經考慮公眾諮詢收集到的意見及相關國際標準後，我們將採納「相同風險，相同監管」1 的方式制定穩定幣的監管制度及界定其監管範圍。未來我們率先規管的對象將是那些標榜與一種或以上法定貨幣的價值掛鈎的穩定幣，因為這類穩定幣可能對貨幣及金融穩定帶來更高及更迫切的潛在風險。我們相信在訂立適當的規範下，業界將可更安全穩妥地開拓數碼金融的潛力。
mt_raw: Finally, while we embrace financial innovation and the benefits it brings, we also recognize the need to monitor and address the risks that may arise from related developments. We are closely monitoring developments in the virtual asset sector and participating in international discussions on relevant regulatory matters. After considering the feedback collected from public consultations and relevant international standards, we will adopt the "same risk, same regulation" approach in formulating the regulatory regime for stablecoins and defining its regulatory scope. In the future, our initial regulatory focus will be on those stablecoins that claim to be pegged to the value of one or more fiat currencies, as these types of stablecoins may pose higher and more imminent potential risks to monetary and financial stability. We believe that with the establishment of appropriate regulations, the industry will be able to explore the potential of digital finance in a safer and more secure manner.

src_raw: 儘管香港經濟在2023 年初出現復甦跡象，但外圍環境仍然充滿挑戰及不確定性。近期美國和歐洲的銀行業受壓，個別美國本土銀行在2023 年3 月倒閉，對環球金融市場造成漣漪效應，而主要央行收緊貨幣政策，很有可能令2023 年全球經濟增長放緩甚或衰退。另一方面，地緣政治局勢緊張，以及去全球化的威脅持續，可能會繼續拖累全球貿易，並會令環球金融市場不時出現波動。儘管如此，香港金融體系憑藉多年來所建立穩健的抗震能力及充裕的緩衝，有足夠能力抵禦不利衝擊。
mt_raw: Although signs of economic recovery emerged in Hong Kong at the beginning of 2023, the external environment remains challenging and uncertain. Recently, the banking sectors in the United States and Europe have come under pressure, with certain U.S. domestic banks collapsing in March 2023, causing a ripple effect across global financial markets. The tightening of monetary policy by major central banks is likely to slow global economic growth or even lead to a recession in 2023. Meanwhile, ongoing geopolitical tensions and the threat of deglobalization may continue to weigh on global trade and cause periodic volatility in international financial markets. Nevertheless, Hong Kong’s financial system, underpinned by years of robust resilience and ample buffers, is well-equipped to withstand adverse shocks.

mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) attaches great importance to safeguarding monetary and financial stability. Looking ahead, in the face of an uncertain macroeconomic environment, the HKMA will remain vigilant, strive to promptly identify emerging risks, and respond flexibly. At the same time, the HKMA will continue to seize opportunities and create policy space to further enhance Hong Kong’s status as a major international financial center. In a challenging investment environment, the HKMA will continue to adopt a prudent investment approach in managing the Exchange Fund, while maintaining sufficient flexibility to take defensive measures as needed and ensuring high liquidity.

src_raw: 隨着銀行在業務營運中更廣泛應用科技，金管局會致力提升銀行業的運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力。繼5月發出《監管政策手冊》新單元「運作穩健性」後，金管局會與業界保持緊密聯繫，審視認可機構在制定運作穩健性框架方面的進度。同時，金管局將透過跟進認可機構在「網絡防衛評估框架2.0」評估下發現的問題以及檢視認可機構實施穩固三重數據備份的進展，提高銀行業的網絡防衛能力。
mt_raw: As banks increasingly adopt technology in their business operations, the HKMA is committed to enhancing the operational resilience and cyber defense capability of the banking sector. Following the issuance of the new "Operational Resilience" module in the Supervisory Policy Manual in May, the HKMA will maintain close engagement with the industry to review the progress of authorized institutions in developing operational resilience frameworks. src_raw: 在2023年，金管局的工作重點包括更新監管資訊、加強打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（反洗錢）生態系統各持份者的合作以應對洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（洗錢）風險，以及進一步推動反洗錢監管科技與合規科技的發展。金管局的《打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集指引》亦會作出修訂，並會就「政治人物」採取與風險相稱的措施發出具體指引，從而促進業界以有效及風險為本的方法落實法例的主要修訂。與此同時，金管局會擴大現有公私營夥伴合作的涵蓋範圍以加強訊息共享，以及支持推出銀行之間的訊息共享平台，藉以加快偵測可疑戶口及防範戶口被濫用，並加強對騙案受害人的保障和協助受害人追討損失。金管局亦會透過「反洗錢合規科技實驗室」及其他反洗錢合規科技項目，進一步集中推動採用合規科技（包括數據分析），並致力發展宏觀分析能力，以配合其數據為本的反洗錢監管工作。透過實施上述各項措施，金管局將能更迅速針對傀儡戶口網絡等系統性洗錢風險採取相應措施，以及靈活應對不斷轉變的威脅。
mt_raw: In 2023, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) will focus on updating regulatory information, strengthening cooperation among stakeholders in the anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing (AML/CFT) ecosystem to address money laundering and terrorist financing (ML/TF) risks, and further promoting the development of AML regulatory technology and regtech. The HKMA’s "Guideline on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Financing of Terrorists" will also be revised, with specific guidance to be issued on taking risk-proportionate measures regarding "politically exposed persons," thereby facilitating the industry’s effective and risk-based implementation of major legislative amendments. At the same time, the HKMA will expand the scope of existing public-private partnership arrangements to enhance information sharing, and support the launch of an interbank information sharing platform to expedite the detection of suspicious accounts and prevent account misuse, as well as to strengthen the protection of scam victims and assist them in recovering losses. Through the "AML Regtech Lab" and other AML regtech initiatives, the HKMA will further focus on promoting the adoption of regtech (including data analytics) and is committed to developing macro-analytical capabilities to support its data-driven AML supervisory work. By implementing the above measures, the HKMA will be able to respond more swiftly to systemic ML risks such as mule account networks and flexibly address evolving threats.

mt_raw: In 2023, the HKMA will strengthen both on-site examinations and off-site monitoring of the conduct of authorized institutions in wealth management and the sale of securities, Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) products, and other investment and insurance products. Key areas of focus for 2023 will include the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect scheme, digital distribution and advisory platforms, virtual assets, environmental, social, and governance (ESG) investment products, and long-term insurance products. The HKMA will take into account the latest market developments and revisions to international standards in these processes.

src_raw: 金管局的目標是按照《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）、《金融市場基建的原則》（《基建原則》），以及支付及金融基建委員會發出的各項指引促進其所監察的金融市場基建的安全及效率，按需要參照最新的國際標準評估各項基建。金管局會參與支付及金融基建委員會與國際證監會組織對實施《基建原則》的監察及評估計劃，亦會參與國際標準制定組織的工作，並參照國際慣例或因應市場及科技發展加強本身的監察規定。同時，如有需要，金管局會與有關當局合作，進一步加強合作監察安排。
mt_raw: The HKMA aims to promote the safety and efficiency of the financial market infrastructures (FMIs) under its supervision in accordance with the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (the "Payment Ordinance"), the Principles for Financial Market Infrastructures (the "PFMI"), and various guidelines issued by the Payment and Financial Infrastructure Committee, referencing the latest international standards as necessary in its assessments. The HKMA will participate in the monitoring and assessment programs for the implementation of the PFMI conducted by the Payment and Financial Infrastructure Committee and the International Organization of Securities Commissions, and will engage in the work of international standard-setting bodies, strengthening its own supervisory requirements in line with international practices or in response to market and technological developments. Where necessary, the HKMA will also cooperate with relevant authorities to further enhance cooperative oversight arrangements.

src_raw:
金管局會透過實施巴塞爾銀行監管委員會（巴塞爾委員會）近年發布的標準，進一步優化資本框架，當中包括：
- 2017年12月《巴塞爾協定三：危機後改革的最終方案》、2019年1月（2019年2月修訂）《市場風險最低資本規定》，以及2020年7月《信用估值調整風險架構具針對性的修訂》所載的經修訂資本標準 — 上述經修訂資本標準統稱《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案，載明信用風險、市場風險、信用估值調整風險及業務操作風險的新監管處理方法，並引入出項下限規定，以及優化槓桿比率框架。經過2022年的多輪業界諮詢後，金管局計劃在2023年就《銀行業（資本）規則》（《資本規則》）的建議修訂進行法定諮詢，以實施上述各項規定及正值中性逆周期緩衝資本。有關修訂預計於同年內提交立法會進行先訂立後審議程序，並不早於2024年1月1日生效，作為最低要求。
- 2022年12月《加密資產風險承擔的審慎處理方法》金管局計劃按照巴塞爾委員會的時間表，在2025年1月1日於本地實施有關標準，並打算於2023年就相關建議諮詢業界。
mt_raw:
The HKMA will further enhance the capital framework by implementing standards issued in recent years by the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (BCBS), including:
- The December 2017 "Basel III: Finalising post-crisis reforms," the January 2019 (revised in February 2019) "Minimum capital requirements for market risk," and the July 2020 "Targeted revisions to the credit valuation adjustment (CVA) risk framework"—collectively referred to as the final Basel III reform package, which sets out new regulatory approaches for credit risk, market risk, CVA risk, and operational risk, introduces output floor requirements, and refines the leverage ratio framework. Following multiple rounds of industry consultation in 2022, the HKMA plans to conduct statutory consultation in 2023 on proposed amendments to the Banking (Capital) Rules (the "Capital Rules") to implement these requirements and the countercyclical capital buffer at a neutral level. The relevant amendments are expected to be submitted to the Legislative Council within the same year for the negative vetting procedure and will take effect no earlier than 1 January 2024 as minimum requirements.
- The December 2022 "Prudential treatment of cryptoasset exposures"—the HKMA plans to implement these standards locally in accordance with the BCBS timeline on 1 January 2025, and intends to consult the industry on the relevant proposals in 2023.

src_raw: 金管局於2023年3月就《銀行業（風險承擔限度）規則》的建議修訂諮詢業界。有關建議修訂主要是因應金管局實施上文提及的《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案下的經修訂資本標準而提出。諮詢文件亦包括就《資本規則》下有關官方實體集中風險的處理方法所作出的其他相應修訂。經修訂規則的目標實施日期將與落實《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案的經修訂《資本規則》中的信用風險部分的實施日期一致（即不早於2024年1月1日）。
mt_raw: In March 2023, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) consulted the industry on proposed amendments to the Banking (Exposure Limits) Rules. These proposed amendments are primarily in response to the revised capital standards under the final reform package of Basel III, as mentioned above. The consultation paper also includes other corresponding amendments regarding the treatment of concentration risk to official sector entities under the Capital Rules. The target implementation date for the revised rules will align with the implementation date of the credit risk component of the revised Capital Rules under the final reform package of Basel III (i.e., no earlier than 1 January 2024).

src_raw: 金管局擬於2023年諮詢業界有關透過《2023年銀行業（流動性）（修訂）規則》（《2023年流動性修訂規則》）對《銀行業（流動性）規則》作出的建議修訂。相關修訂是因應同時期的《資本規則》建議修訂而作出，所以《2023年流動性修訂規則》的目標實施日期將與落實《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案的經修訂《資本規則》中的信用風險部分的實施日期一致（即不早於2024年1月1日）。
mt_raw: The HKMA intends to consult the industry in 2023 on proposed amendments to the Banking (Liquidity) Rules through the Banking (Liquidity) (Amendment) Rules 2023 (the "2023 Liquidity Amendment Rules"). These amendments are made in response to the proposed amendments to the Capital Rules during the same period. Therefore, the target implementation date for the 2023 Liquidity Amendment Rules will align with the implementation date of the credit risk component of the revised Capital Rules under the final reform package of Basel III (i.e., no earlier than 1 January 2024).

src_raw: 《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案中與經修訂資本標準相關的新的及經修訂的披露規定，主要載於巴塞爾委員會分別於2018年12月及2021年11月發出的《第三支柱1 披露規定 — 更新框架》及《修訂市場風險披露規定》。巴塞爾委員會亦於2019年6月發出《修訂槓桿比率披露規定》，藉修訂槓桿比率的披露規定處理對潛在「粉飾櫥窗」（指銀行在報告日期前後減少某些交易的交易量，從而人為地提高報告及公開披露的槓桿比率）的關注。為在香港實施上述新的及經修訂的披露規定，金管局亦正擬備《銀行業（披露）規則》（《披露規則》）的相應修訂，以及經修訂後的標準披露模版及表格，並在過程中徵詢業界意見。預計《披露規則》的修訂將於2023年內連同《資本規則》的修訂一併提交立法會進行先訂立後審議程序。
mt_raw: The new and revised disclosure requirements related to the revised capital standards under the final reform package of Basel III are mainly set out in the Basel Committee's "Pillar 3 disclosure requirements – updated framework" issued in December 2018 and "Revised market risk disclosure requirements" issued in November 2021. The Basel Committee also issued the "Revised leverage ratio disclosure requirements" in June 2019, which address concerns over potential "window dressing" (referring to banks reducing the volume of certain transactions around reporting dates to artificially inflate reported and publicly disclosed leverage ratios) by amending the disclosure requirements for the leverage ratio. To implement the above new and revised disclosure requirements in Hong Kong, the HKMA is also preparing corresponding amendments to the Banking (Disclosure) Rules (the "Disclosure Rules"), as well as revised standard disclosure templates and forms, and is consulting the industry in the process. It is expected that the amendments to the Disclosure Rules will be submitted to the Legislative Council for the negative vetting procedure in 2023, together with the amendments to the Capital Rules.

mt_raw: The HKMA forms part of the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (the HKSAR Government), but is permitted to employ staff on terms different from those of civil servants, in order to attract individuals with the appropriate experience and specialized knowledge. The Chief Executive of the HKMA and its staff are all public officers. The HKMA’s daily operations are highly autonomous within the statutory powers conferred upon or delegated to the Monetary Authority.

src_raw: 財政司司長負責釐定香港的貨幣政策目標及貨幣體制：財政司司長於2003年6月25日致金融管理專員的函件中，訂明應透過貨幣發行局制度維持貨幣穩定，將港元匯率保持在約7.80港元兌1美元的水平。金融管理專員須自行負責達成貨幣政策目標，包括決定有關的策略、工具及執行方式，並負責維持香港貨幣制度的穩定與健全。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary is responsible for determining Hong Kong’s monetary policy objectives and monetary system. In a letter dated 25 June 2003 to the Monetary Authority, the Financial Secretary stipulated that monetary stability should be maintained through the Currency Board system, keeping the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate at around HK$7.80 to US$1. The Monetary Authority is responsible for achieving the monetary policy objectives, including determining the relevant strategies, tools, and methods of implementation, and for maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary system.

src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；及
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。
mt_raw:
The Monetary Authority is appointed by the Financial Secretary, and thus the HKMA is accountable to the public through the Financial Secretary. As the HKMA’s powers are established by legislation passed by the Legislative Council, the HKMA is also accountable to the public through the Legislative Council. The HKMA also recognizes its broader responsibility to promote public understanding of its role and objectives, and to closely monitor issues of public concern. In carrying out its daily work and maintaining extensive engagement with the community, the HKMA is committed to maximizing transparency and maintaining an open policy. This policy has two main objectives:
- Subject to statutory restrictions on market sensitivity, commercial secrets, and confidential information disclosure, to ensure the financial sector and public are fully informed about the HKMA’s work; and
- To ensure the HKMA remains attuned to the pulse of society and responds appropriately to public opinion.

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、監管資源、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有大量金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。有關金管局與公眾溝通及聯繫的工作，詳見「機構職能」一章（第157至162頁）。
mt_raw: The HKMA strives to achieve the highest international standards of transparency, maintaining extensive contact with the media and publishing a range of periodicals and special publications in both Chinese and English. The HKMA’s bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) features dedicated sections on economic research, statistics, supervisory resources, consumer information, and other topics, as well as a wealth of HKMA publications, press releases, speeches, and briefing materials. In addition, the HKMA utilizes social media platforms to communicate more effectively with the public in the digital age. The HKMA office houses an Information Centre, comprising a library and an exhibition area, which is open to the public six days a week for visits and use. Details of the HKMA’s work in public communication and engagement can be found in the chapter “Institutional Functions” (pages 157 to 162).

mt_raw: The frequency and detail of the HKMA’s disclosure of Exchange Fund and Currency Board accounts have been progressively increased. src_raw: 面對第五波新冠病毒疫情、金融狀況收緊及充滿挑戰的外圍環境，香港經濟在2022年顯著收縮。勞工市場持續一段時間轉差，其後逐步改善，而通脹則維持溫和。資產市場亦有所受壓。受惠於內地與香港全面通關，預計2023年香港經濟增長將由低位復甦。
mt_raw: Faced with the fifth wave of the COVID-19 pandemic, tightening financial conditions, and a highly challenging external environment, Hong Kong's economy contracted significantly in 2022. The labour market deteriorated for a period before gradually improving, while inflation remained moderate. The asset market also came under pressure. Benefiting from the full border reopening between Mainland China and Hong Kong, economic growth in Hong Kong is expected to recover from its low point in 2023.

src_raw: 受本地及外圍環境各項不利因素拖累，香港經濟在2022年收縮3.5%（表1及圖1）。本地方面，由於香港爆發第五波新冠病毒疫情，私人消費在第1季急跌，其後受惠於社交距離措施逐步放寬及政府消費券計劃的刺激，私人消費再度錄得按季增長。在營商氣氛疲弱及金融狀況收緊下，整體投資支出較2021年顯著下跌。對外方面，隨着外部需求轉弱，加上內地與香港之間的跨境陸路貨運受阻，香港貨物出口下挫。服務輸出依然大致疲弱，部分反映訪港旅遊活動低迷，但其後隨着政府於9月下旬撤銷抵港強制檢疫要求，情況於第4季稍為改善。
mt_raw: Dragged down by various adverse factors both domestically and externally, Hong Kong's economy contracted by 3.5% in 2022 (Table 1 and Chart 1). Domestically, the outbreak of the fifth wave of COVID-19 in Hong Kong led to a sharp decline in private consumption in the first quarter. Subsequently, private consumption recorded quarter-on-quarter growth again, benefiting from the gradual relaxation of social distancing measures and the government's consumption voucher scheme. Amid weak business sentiment and tightening financial conditions, overall investment expenditure fell significantly compared to 2021. Externally, as external demand weakened and cross-border land freight between Mainland China and Hong Kong was disrupted, Hong Kong's goods exports declined. Service exports remained generally subdued, partly reflecting sluggish inbound tourism activity. However, the situation improved slightly in the fourth quarter as the government lifted the mandatory quarantine requirement for arrivals in late September.

src_raw: 本地通脹壓力於2022年稍升，但仍屬溫和。具體而言，按年基本通脹率逐步上升至12月2%的溫和水平，其中外圍能源及食品價格高企的影響部分被溫和的本地成本壓力所抵銷，尤其是偏軟的房屋租金（圖2）。此外，在經濟活動疲弱下，名義工資增長及商業樓宇租金持續偏軟，亦有助遏抑通脹。2022年全年合計，基本及整體通脹率分別為1.7%及1.9%。
mt_raw: Local inflationary pressures rose slightly in 2022 but remained moderate. Specifically, the underlying year-on-year inflation rate gradually increased to a moderate level of 2% in December. The impact of persistently high external energy and food prices was partly offset by moderate local cost pressures, especially soft housing rents (Chart 2). In addition, amid weak economic activity, nominal wage growth and commercial property rents remained subdued, which also helped contain inflation. For the whole of 2022, the underlying and overall inflation rates were 1.7% and 1.9%, respectively.

src_raw: 疫情下勞工市場狀況在2022年初急速惡化，但隨後持續改善。失業率在4月升至5.4%的高位後，於12月顯著回落至3.5%（圖3），當中大多數行業的失業率均有所下降。總就業人數（圖3）及私營機構職位空缺回升，反映整體勞工需求逐步回復，惟總就業人數仍低於疫情前水平。名義工資和勞工收入的按年升幅亦略為加快。另一方面，與去年同期比較，勞動人口於12月略為減少1.5%，部分原因是勞動人口參與率輕微下跌。
mt_raw: The labour market deteriorated rapidly at the beginning of 2022 due to the pandemic, but subsequently continued to improve. The unemployment rate rose to a high of 5.4% in April before falling significantly to 3.5% in December (Chart 3), with most sectors recording a decline in unemployment rates. Total employment (Chart 3) and private sector job vacancies rebounded, reflecting a gradual recovery in overall labour demand, although total employment remained below pre-pandemic levels. The year-on-year growth in nominal wages and labour income also accelerated slightly. On the other hand, compared with the same period last year, the labour force in December decreased slightly by 1.5%, partly due to a slight decline in the labour force participation rate.

src_raw: 本港股市在2022年出現大幅波動。承接2021年的下行趨勢，恒生指數加速下跌，在2022年10月31日收報14,687點，是自2009年以來的最低水平（圖4）。股市顯著調整，最初是由市場對本地新冠病毒疫情、美國加息及俄烏局勢的憂慮加劇所觸發，其後由於環球金融狀況收緊及內地新冠病毒疫情導致環球經濟前景轉差，令股市調整幅度進一步擴大。股市在年內最後兩個月重拾一些上升動力，部分受到內地優化防疫抗疫措施所支持。恒生指數於年底收報19,781點，較2021年底顯著下跌15.5%，連續第三年下挫。
mt_raw: Hong Kong's stock market experienced significant volatility in 2022. Continuing the downward trend from 2021, the Hang Seng Index accelerated its decline, closing at 14,687 points on 31 October 2022, the lowest level since 2009 (Chart 4). The sharp market correction was initially triggered by heightened concerns over the local COVID-19 outbreak, US interest rate hikes, and the Russia-Ukraine situation. Subsequently, the correction deepened due to tightening global financial conditions and the COVID-19 situation in Mainland China, which led to a deterioration in the global outlook for the economy. In the last two months of the year, the stock market regained some upward momentum, partly supported by the Mainland's optimization of epidemic prevention and control measures. The Hang Seng Index closed at 19,781 points at the end of the year, representing a significant decline of 15.5% compared to the end of 2021, marking the third consecutive year of decline.

src_raw: 在金融狀況收緊及經濟活動疲弱下，住宅物業市場亦有所受壓。樓價於2022年回落15%（圖4），成交量也大幅縮減39%至45,050宗，創下有紀錄以來的新低。儘管樓價下跌，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊。實際按揭利率於年內由約1.6厘上升至3.375至3.625厘，增加供樓人士的按揭供款負擔。非住宅物業市場亦進一步回軟。在空置率高企下，其價格有所回落，租金亦維持偏軟。
mt_raw: Amid tightening financial conditions and weak economic activity, the residential property market also came under pressure. Property prices fell by 15% in 2022 (Chart 4), and transaction volume shrank sharply by 39% to 45,050 cases, setting a new record low. Despite the decline in property prices, home affordability remained tight. The effective mortgage interest rate rose from about 1.6% to between 3.375% and 3.625% during the year, increasing the mortgage repayment burden for mortgage payers. The non-residential property market also softened further. With vacancy rates remaining high, prices declined and rents remained subdued.

src_raw: 受惠於內地與香港全面通關，預期2023年香港經濟增長將由低位復甦。儘管先進經濟體增長預期放緩將繼續拖累香港貨物出口，但內地經濟復甦及跨境陸路貨運限制撤銷，應能為本港經濟提供支持。內地與香港全面通關亦有望令香港入境旅遊及其他服務輸出顯著受惠，並提振本地營商氣氛及資本開支。私人消費亦將會在勞工市場轉強下進一步改善。政府預測2023年全年實質本地生產總值會顯著增長，介乎3.5至5.5%。然而，香港經濟增長前景仍受眾多風險及不明朗因素所影響，並很大程度上取決於美國聯邦儲備局政策利率走勢、全球增長前景、地緣政治局勢持續緊張以及本地入境旅遊的復甦步伐。
mt_raw: Benefiting from the full border reopening between Mainland China and Hong Kong, Hong Kong’s economic growth in 2023 is expected to recover from its low point. Although the anticipated slowdown in advanced economies will continue to weigh on Hong Kong’s goods exports, the recovery of the Mainland economy and the removal of cross-border land freight restrictions should provide support to the local economy. The full border reopening between the Mainland and Hong Kong is also expected to significantly benefit inbound tourism and other service exports, as well as boost local business sentiment and capital expenditure. Private consumption is also set to further improve as the labour market strengthens. The government forecasts that Hong Kong’s real GDP will record a significant increase in 2023, ranging between 3.5% and 5.5%. Nevertheless, the outlook for Hong Kong’s economic growth remains subject to numerous risks and uncertainties, and will largely depend on the policy interest rate trajectory of the US Federal Reserve, global growth prospects, ongoing geopolitical tensions, and the pace of recovery in inbound tourism.

src_raw: 香港銀行體系在2022年面對充滿挑戰的宏觀經濟環境，包括年初爆發第五波新冠病毒疫情、地緣政治局勢升溫，以及全球各大央行大幅度加息應對通脹上升等。面對各項挑戰，香港銀行應付裕如，資本及流動性狀況繼續保持充裕。年內銀行體系面對的信貸風險增加，但整體資產質素維持於健康水平。與此同時，利率上升促使銀行淨利息收入增加，但其正面影響因呆壞帳準備金增加及費用與佣金收入減少而被局部抵銷。整體而言，零售銀行盈利較2021年改善。
mt_raw: In 2022, Hong Kong’s banking sector faced a challenging macroeconomic environment, including the outbreak of the fifth wave of the COVID-19 pandemic at the beginning of the year, heightened geopolitical tensions, and significant interest rate hikes by major central banks globally in response to rising inflation. Despite these challenges, Hong Kong banks coped well, with capital and liquidity positions remaining robust. The banking sector faced increased credit risk during the year, but overall asset quality remained at a healthy level. At the same time, rising interest rates boosted banks’ net interest income, though the positive impact was partially offset by increased provisions for bad debts and a decline in fee and commission income. Overall, retail banks’ profit improved compared to 2021.

src_raw: 銀行體系的特定分類貸款比率由2021年底的0.89%上升至2022年底的1.38%，逾期及經重組貸款比率於同期由0.56%升至0.85%（圖5）。中國內地相關貸款的特定分類貸款比率於2022年底為2.21%，亦較2021年底的0.89%上升。特定分類貸款比率上升，主要是由於部分內地房地產發展商的貸款評級被下調。儘管如此，銀行撥備充足，截至2022年底，銀行信貸撥備覆蓋率（即信貸撥備和特定分類貸款比率）約維持於80%。若將抵押品變現價值從呆壞帳餘額中扣除，銀行信貸撥備覆蓋率約140%。另一方面，2022年底住宅按揭貸款及信用卡貸款的拖欠比率仍然處於低位，分別為0.06%及0.23%（圖6）。
mt_raw: The classified loan ratio of the banking sector rose from 0.89% at end-2021 to 1.38% at end-2022, while the overdue and restructured loan ratio increased from 0.56% to 0.85% over the same period (Figure 5). The classified loan ratio for Mainland China-related lending stood at 2.21% at end-2022, up from 0.89% at end-2021. The increase in the classified loan ratio was mainly due to the downgrading of loans to certain Mainland property developers. Nevertheless, banks’ provisioning remained adequate. As at end-2022, the loan loss coverage ratio (i.e., loan loss provisions to classified loans) was maintained at around 80%. If the realizable value of collateral is deducted from the balance of bad debts, the loan loss coverage ratio is about 140%. Meanwhile, the delinquency ratios for residential mortgage loans and credit card loans remained low at end-2022, at 0.06% and 0.23% respectively (Figure 6).

src_raw: 銀行體系在2022年繼續錄得盈利。年內零售銀行的整體除稅前經營溢利上升19.0%（圖7）。盈利改善是受惠於淨利息收入（+34%）及外匯與衍生工具收入增加（+72%），但部分升幅被呆壞帳準備金增加（+151%）及費用與佣金收入減少（–19%）所抵銷。在加息環境下，淨息差由上一年的0.98%擴闊至2022年的1.31%（圖8）。年內市場波動增加，亦令銀行來自外匯及衍生工具業務的收入增加。呆壞帳準備金增加是由於須為新的特定分類貸款預留特殊準備金，而在金融市場表現疲弱下，費用及佣金收入減少。零售銀行成本與收入比率由2021年的54.7%，降至2022年的48.0%（圖9）。
mt_raw: The banking sector continued to record profit in 2022. During the year, the overall pre-tax operating profit of retail banks increased by 19.0% (Figure 7). The improvement in profit was driven by increases in net interest income (+34%) and income from foreign exchange and derivatives (+72%), though part of the increase was offset by higher provisions for bad debts (+151%) and a decrease in fee and commission income (–19%). In a rising interest rate environment, the net interest margin widened from 0.98% in the previous year to 1.31% in 2022 (Figure 8). Increased market volatility during the year also boosted banks’ income from foreign exchange and derivatives business. The increase in provisions for bad debts was due to the need to set aside special provisions for new classified loans, while the weak performance of financial markets led to a decrease in fee and commission income. The retail banks’ cost-to-income ratio fell from 54.7% in 2021 to 48.0% in 2022 (Figure 9).

src_raw: 2022年銀行體系資產負債表擴大2.5%。資產上升是由於外匯及衍生工具持倉按市價計值增加。面對外圍不明朗因素及利率趨升，年內貸款需求減弱。相比2021年錄得3.8%的增幅，2022年貸款總額減少3.0%。其中在香港境外使用的貸款減少10.2%，貿易融資減少13.5%，在香港使用的貸款則稍增0.9%。中國內地相關貸款繼2021年增長3.7%後，於2022年減少4.4%。
mt_raw: In 2022, the banking sector’s balance sheet expanded by 2.5%. The increase in assets was due to the mark-to-market valuation gains in foreign exchange and derivatives positions. Amid external uncertainties and rising interest rates, loan demand weakened during the year. Compared to a 3.8% increase in 2021, total loans decreased by 3.0% in 2022. Loans for use outside Hong Kong fell by 10.2%, trade finance dropped by 13.5%, while loans for use in Hong Kong edged up by 0.9%. Mainland China-related lending, after growing by 3.7% in 2021, declined by 4.4% in 2022.

src_raw: 銀行體系的流動性狀況繼續維持穩健，成為在宏觀經濟環境不明朗因素加劇下的重要支柱。第1類機構的季度平均流動性覆蓋比率在2022年第4季為162.3%，第2類機構的季度平均流動性維持比率為63.2%（圖13）。銀行體系的主要資金來源仍然是客戶存款。於2022年底，第1類機構的穩定資金淨額比率及第2A類機構的核心資金比率分別為137.7%及155.7%（圖14）。以上所有4個比率均遠高於法定最低要求。
mt_raw: Liquidity conditions in the banking sector remained robust, serving as a key pillar amid heightened uncertainties in the macroeconomic environment. The quarterly average liquidity coverage ratio for Category 1 institutions was 162.3% in the fourth quarter of 2022, while the quarterly average liquidity maintenance ratio for Category 2 institutions was 63.2% (Figure 13). Customer deposits continued to be the main source of funding for the banking sector. At the end of 2022, the net stable funding ratio for Category 1 institutions and the core funding ratio for Category 2A institutions were 137.7% and 155.7%, respectively (Figure 14). All four of these ratios were well above the statutory minimum requirements.

src_raw: 隨着美國收緊貨幣政策，港元在2022年轉弱，弱方兌換保證於5月至11月期間被觸發41次。在本港股市成交轉旺及年底季節性資金需求的帶動下，港元在11月中開始轉強。在聯繫匯率制度下，香港銀行同業拆息大致跟隨美元銀行同業拆息的走勢。由於美國持續加息，香港銀行同業拆息於2022年內逐步上升。整體而言，港元外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，交易暢順有序。作為香港貨幣及金融穩定的基石，聯繫匯率制度一直展現強大抵禦外來衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: With the United States tightening its monetary policy, the Hong Kong dollar weakened in 2022, and the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 41 times between May and November. Driven by increased trading activity in the local stock market and seasonal funding demand at year-end, the Hong Kong dollar began to strengthen in mid-November. Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, HIBOR generally tracked the movements of US dollar interbank offered rates. Due to the continued interest rate hikes in the US, HIBOR gradually rose throughout 2022. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange and money markets remained stable, with smooth and orderly trading. As the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability, the Linked Exchange Rate System has consistently demonstrated a strong ability to withstand external shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong’s monetary policy is to maintain Monetary Stability, that is, to ensure the stability of the Hong Kong dollar’s exchange rate, keeping it within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar in the foreign exchange market. This monetary system mainly adopts a currency board system, which requires that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund provide at least 100% backing for the monetary base; any change in the monetary base must be matched by a corresponding change in US dollar reserves, maintaining a 100% correlation with changes in the monetary base.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。當強方（或弱方）兌換保證被觸發，金管局會應銀行要求，按每美元兌7.75港元向銀行沽出港元、買入美元（或按7.85港元買入港元、沽出美元），使總結餘增加（或減少），令港元利率下跌（或上升），從而促使港元匯率回復到7.75至7.85的兌換範圍。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through the Automatic Interest Rate Adjustment Mechanism and its firm commitment to fulfilling the Convertibility Undertaking. When the strong-side (or weak-side) Convertibility Undertaking is triggered, the HKMA, upon banks’ requests, will sell Hong Kong dollars and buy US dollars at HK$7.75 per US dollar (or buy Hong Kong dollars and sell US dollars at HK$7.85 per US dollar), thereby increasing (or decreasing) the Aggregate Balance, causing Hong Kong dollar interest rates to fall (or rise), and thus guiding the exchange rate back to the 7.75–7.85 range.

src_raw: 受到本港股市調整、市場預期美國進一步加息，以及在香港銀行同業拆息與倫敦銀行同業拆息的負息差下的套息交易帶動，港元在2022年初轉弱，並在其後的月份一直貼近弱方兌換保證水平。弱方兌換保證於5月至11月期間被觸發41次。在本港股市成交轉旺及年底季節性資金需求的帶動下，港元在11月中開始轉強（圖1）。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2022年全年繼續運作正常。
mt_raw: Due to adjustments in the local stock market, market expectations of further US interest rate hikes, and carry trades driven by the negative interest rate spread between HIBOR and LIBOR, the Hong Kong dollar weakened at the beginning of 2022 and remained close to the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level in subsequent months. The weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 41 times between May and November. Driven by increased trading activity in the local stock market and seasonal funding demand at year-end, the Hong Kong dollar began to strengthen in mid-November (Figure 1). Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market continued to function normally throughout 2022.

src_raw: 為應付銀行對外匯基金票據的持續需求，金管局於2022年初增發總值400億港元的外匯基金票據。此外，金管局在2022年5月至11月間按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率水平共買入2,421億港元。總結餘由2021年底的3,775億港元，減少至2022年底的963億港元，反映增發外匯基金票據，以及弱方兌換保證被觸發的影響。與此同時，未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額在年內由11,488億港元，稍增至12,004億港元。因此，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2021年底的15,263 億港元，減少至 2022 年底的 12,967 億港元（圖2）。整體貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: To meet the ongoing demand from banks for Exchange Fund Bills, the HKMA issued an additional HK$40 billion of Exchange Fund Bills at the beginning of 2022. In addition, between May and November 2022, in accordance with the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the HKMA, upon banks’ requests, bought a total of HK$242.1 billion at the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking rate. The Aggregate Balance decreased from HK$377.5 billion at the end of 2021 to HK$96.3 billion at the end of 2022, reflecting the impact of the additional issuance of Exchange Fund Bills and the triggering of the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking. Meanwhile, the outstanding amount of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes increased slightly from HK$1,148.8 billion to HK$1,200.4 billion during the year. As a result, the sum of the Aggregate Balance and the outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes decreased from HK$1,526.3 billion at the end of 2021 to HK$1,296.7 billion at the end of 2022 (Figure 2). The overall monetary base continued to be fully backed by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 在聯匯制度下，香港銀行同業拆息大致跟隨美元銀行同業拆息的走勢。由於美國在2022年持續加息，香港銀行同業拆息逐步上升（圖3）。全年計，隔夜、1個月及3個月香港銀行同業拆息分別上升318、419及473基點至年底時的3.23厘、4.35厘及4.99厘。
mt_raw: Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, HIBOR generally tracked the movements of US dollar interbank offered rates. As the US continued to raise interest rates in 2022, HIBOR gradually increased (Figure 3). Over the year, overnight, 1-month, and 3-month HIBOR rose by 318, 419, and 473 basis points respectively, reaching 3.23%, 4.35%, and 4.99% at year-end.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調，基本利率上調7次，合共4.25個百分點（即425基點），由0.5厘上升至4.75厘（圖3）。在零售層面，隨着美國上調政策利率，多間銀行在9月下旬調高最優惠貸款利率12.5基點，在11月初再調高25基點，以及在12月中再調高25基點。部分銀行亦於年內提高以香港銀行同業拆息為基礎的新批按揭利率上限。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2021年的68億港元增至2022年的84億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the upward adjustment of the US federal funds target range, the Base Rate was raised seven times, by a total of 4.25 percentage points (i.e., 425 basis points), from 0.5% to 4.75% (Figure 3). At the retail level, following the US policy rate hikes, several banks raised their prime lending rates by 12.5 basis points in late September, by another 25 basis points in early November, and by a further 25 basis points in mid-December. Some banks also raised the cap on new mortgage rates based on HIBOR during the year. Overall, the Hong Kong money market continued to operate normally. Discount Window borrowing increased from HK$6.8 billion in 2021 to HK$8.4 billion in 2022.

src_raw: 接近40年來，聯匯制度一直是香港金融體系的重要支柱，展現強大的應對挑戰的能力。儘管2022年全球金融狀況反覆，港元外匯及貨幣市場維持有序運作，反映聯匯制度穩健有效。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。國際貨幣基金組織在《2022年對外部門報告》一再重申香港擁有具透明度的規則、龐大的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融規管與監管、靈活的經濟，以及審慎的財政架構，確保聯匯制度具公信力。
mt_raw: For nearly 40 years, the Linked Exchange Rate System has remained a vital pillar of Hong Kong’s financial system, demonstrating a strong capacity to withstand challenges. Despite the volatile global financial environment in 2022, the Hong Kong dollar’s foreign exchange and money markets continued to operate in an orderly manner, reflecting the robustness and effectiveness of the Linked Exchange Rate System. The government is firmly committed to maintaining the Linked Exchange Rate System. In its 2022 External Sector Report, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) reiterated that Hong Kong possesses transparent rules, substantial fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, sound financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy, and a prudent fiscal framework, all of which ensure the credibility of the Linked Exchange Rate System.

src_raw: 穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用。香港銀行體系繼續運作暢順，流動性及資本狀況以國際標準而言均非常充裕。為確保銀行體系具備抵禦衝擊的能力，金管局一直密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行貸款的監管。
mt_raw: A sound banking system is crucial to the proper functioning of the Linked Exchange Rate System. Hong Kong’s banking system continued to operate smoothly, with liquidity and capital positions remaining very strong by international standards. To ensure the banking system’s resilience to shocks, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has been closely monitoring banks’ credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as the results of stress tests, and maintains supervision over bank lending.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2022年在109.3%至111.0%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報110.1%（圖4）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，加上香港穩健的銀行體系，為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強而有力的後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance the transparency of the Currency Board accounts, since October 1998, a portion of the Exchange Fund’s assets has been designated to back the monetary base. The Backing Ratio (i.e., the ratio of backing assets to the monetary base) fluctuated between 109.3% and 111.0% in 2022, without reaching either the upper or lower limits. As of 31 December, the ratio stood at 110.1% (see Chart 4). Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, although certain Exchange Fund assets have been designated as the backing portfolio, all assets of the Exchange Fund may be used to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The substantial fiscal resources of the Exchange Fund, together with Hong Kong’s robust banking system, provide a strong safeguard for Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會負責監察及探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2022年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括中國內地物業市況、非銀行機構在住宅按揭市場的角色、深度學習在信用風險評估上的應用，以及一個用作評估港元流動性的監察框架。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Sub-Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2022, topics considered by the Currency Board Sub-Committee included property market conditions in Mainland China, the role of non-bank institutions in the residential mortgage market, the application of deep learning in credit risk assessment, and a monitoring framework for assessing Hong Kong dollar liquidity. The minutes of the Currency Board Sub-Committee meetings and the reports on the operation of the Currency Board System submitted by the HKMA are available on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 香港貨幣及金融研究中心（研究中心 完成3份政策研究報告、發表24份研究論文及舉辦16場研討會╱網上研討會，內容涵蓋對香港以至區內具戰略重要性的貨幣與金融研究議題。研究中心亦作出進一步安排，透過全新的開放取用電子期刊發布研究結果，令更廣泛的讀者接收到相關資訊。此外，研究中心在其網站推出全新系列刊物《Insights from Monetary Research Digest》， 為公眾總結研究中心最近的研究成果，提供高層次非技術性的概要。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary and Financial Research (HKIMR) completed three policy research reports, published 24 research papers, and organized 16 seminars/webinars, covering monetary and financial research topics of strategic importance to Hong Kong and the region. The HKIMR also made further arrangements to disseminate research findings through a new open-access e-journal, enabling a wider audience to access relevant information. In addition, the HKIMR launched a new publication series, “Insights from Monetary Research Digest,” on its website, providing the public with high-level, non-technical summaries of the Institute’s recent research findings.

src_raw: 儘管宏觀環境充滿不確定性及挑戰，加上金融市場異常波動，香港銀行體系於2022年維持穩健。年內金管局亦加強對認可機構信用及市場風險管理的監管。此外，鑑於網絡威脅持續增加及銀行業數碼轉型步伐加快，金管局與認可機構緊密合作，提升認可機構的運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力。
mt_raw: Despite the uncertainties and challenges in the macroeconomic environment, coupled with abnormal volatility in the financial markets, Hong Kong’s banking system remained robust in 2022. During the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) also strengthened its supervision of credit and market risk management of authorized institutions. In addition, in view of the persistent increase in cyber threats and the accelerating pace of digital transformation in the banking sector, the HKMA worked closely with authorized institutions to enhance their operational resilience and cyber defense capabilities.

src_raw: 操守監管方面，金管局加強有關「先買後付」產品的消費者保障，並就物業轉按交易提供多一種支付安排。金管局又與其他監管機構合作，就虛擬資產的可持續發展制定監管架構，精簡投資產品銷售程序，以及推出全新的信託業務監管制度。年內有關個人信貸資料的「多間信貸資料服務機構」模式下的「信貸資料平台」啟用，並推出新的強制性背景查核計劃，以應對「滾動的壞蘋果」現象。此外，面對因疫情而實施的旅遊限制，金管局協助推出便利措施讓客戶重新啟動銀行戶口。
mt_raw: In terms of conduct supervision, the HKMA enhanced consumer protection for "Buy Now Pay Later" products and provided an additional payment arrangement for property refinancing transactions. The HKMA also collaborated with other regulatory bodies to develop a regulatory framework for the sustainable development of virtual assets, streamline the sales process for investment products, and launch a new regulatory regime for trust business. During the year, the "Credit Data Platform" under the "Multiple Credit Reference Agencies" model for personal credit data was launched, along with a new mandatory background check scheme to address the phenomenon of "rolling bad apples." Furthermore, in response to travel restrictions imposed due to the pandemic, the HKMA facilitated measures to help customers reactivate their bank accounts.

src_raw: 因應最新的香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估，金管局與銀行透過公私營夥伴合作（包括反訛騙及洗黑錢情報工作組），鞏固香港的打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集生態圈，以及加強應對騙案。此外，金管局亦與策略夥伴合作，以能更充分了解及有效管理日益複雜的地緣政治環境所帶來的風險及不穩定因素。金管局又透過「反洗錢合規科技實驗室」系列進一步推動業界運用數據及科技，並同時加快金管局在反洗錢工作中採用監管科技的步伐。在國際事務方面，金管局積極參與財務行動特別組織的工作。
mt_raw: In response to the latest risk assessment of money laundering and terrorist financing in Hong Kong, the HKMA and banks, through public-private partnerships (including the Anti-Fraud and Anti-Money Laundering Intelligence Task Force), strengthened Hong Kong’s ecosystem for combating money laundering and terrorist financing, and enhanced measures to tackle fraud. The HKMA also worked with strategic partners to better understand and effectively manage the risks and instabilities arising from an increasingly complex geopolitical environment. Through the "AML RegTech Lab" series, the HKMA further promoted the use of data and technology in the industry, while accelerating the adoption of regulatory technology in its own anti-money laundering efforts. Internationally, the HKMA actively participated in the work of the Financial Action Task Force (FATF).

mt_raw: In 2022, significant progress was made locally in implementing international regulatory standards, such as capital adequacy and disclosure standards. In addition, the HKMA made substantial efforts to enhance the industry’s soft power, including collaborating with the banking sector to build a sustainable talent pool and upskilling existing practitioners. Throughout the year, the HKMA maintained close cooperation with the banking industry to improve and streamline regulatory policies and procedures.

src_raw: 銀行可能因營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊及應對危機恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。
mt_raw: Banks may affect Banking Stability due to their mode of operation, or, in extreme cases, through disorderly failure. As the regulatory authority, the Monetary Authority plays a vital role in safeguarding financial stability, ensuring that banks are able to withstand shocks and recover from crises, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Monetary Authority is responsible for the prudential supervision of banks and for authorizing licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies in Hong Kong (collectively referred to as "authorized institutions").

src_raw: 香港的審慎監管制度並非為確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，能有秩序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員在該機制下為認可機構（以及其他類型機構）的處置機制當局。為落實香港的處置機制，有必要制定處置規則及政策標準、進行處置規劃以排除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置瀕臨倒閉認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s prudential regulatory regime is not designed to ensure "zero risk." As one of the resolution authorities, the Monetary Authority strives to ensure that, should an authorized institution become no longer viable, its failure can be managed in an orderly manner. To this end, Hong Kong has established a financial institution resolution regime, under which the Monetary Authority acts as the resolution authority for authorized institutions (and other types of institutions). To implement Hong Kong’s resolution regime, it is necessary to formulate resolution rules and policy standards, conduct resolution planning to remove impediments to the resolvability of authorized institutions, and build the HKMA’s operational capability to resolve failing authorized institutions. To effectively carry out these tasks, the HKMA adopts an internationally consistent and coordinated approach.

mt_raw: The Monetary Authority is also responsible for designating and overseeing certain financial market infrastructures. The HKMA’s oversight of financial market infrastructures aims to promote the overall safety and efficiency of these infrastructures, control systemic risk, and enhance transparency. Strengthening the resilience of financial market infrastructures helps safeguard Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems, preventing disruptions in their operations from affecting stability.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局亦對認可機構的各項業務進行定期現場審查。從審慎監管角度而言，信用風險管理為主要監管重點之一。同時，由於銀行運用科技的情況日趨普及，業務操作風險及科技風險管理是另一個監管重點。隨着綠色及可持續銀行業在香港急速發展，金管局亦已進行一輪以氣候風險管理為重點的專題審查。在操守監管方面，金管局對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為屬較高風險的範疇。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site reviews, the HKMA also conducts regular on-site examinations of the various business activities of authorized institutions. From a prudential supervision perspective, credit risk management is one of the primary supervisory focuses. At the same time, as banks increasingly adopt technology, operational and technology risk management has become another key area of supervision. With the rapid development of green and sustainable banking in Hong Kong, the HKMA has also conducted a round of thematic reviews focusing on climate risk management. In terms of conduct supervision, the HKMA carries out on-site examinations of authorized institutions’ businesses related to securities, investment products, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) products, supplemented by thematic assessments to review areas assessed as higher risk.

src_raw: 過去一年金管局推出多項措施加強銀行體系的運作穩健性。有關措施包括在5月發出《監管政策手冊》新單元「運作穩健性」，載明金管局預期認可機構為確保運作穩健而應維持的管治及管控架構，並舉辦兩場業界對話，增進業界對新標準的了解，以及促進業內的經驗交流（圖示1）。
mt_raw: Over the past year, the HKMA introduced a number of measures to strengthen the operational resilience of the banking system. These measures included the issuance in May of a new module of the Supervisory Policy Manual on "Operational Resilience," which sets out the HKMA’s expectations for the governance and control frameworks that authorized institutions should maintain to ensure operational resilience. Two industry dialogues were also held to enhance industry understanding of the new standards and to facilitate experience sharing within the sector (see Illustration 1).

mt_raw: Given the significant increase in risks associated with phishing scams and other online fraud, the HKMA and the Hong Kong Association of Banks (HKAB) jointly launched a new large-scale public awareness campaign in September themed “Guard Your Digital Key, Think Twice Before You Click!” to raise public vigilance. In July, the HKMA also co-hosted a workshop with the Hong Kong Police Force to brief banks on the latest criminal tactics used by fraudsters.

src_raw: 面對主要經濟體進一步收緊貨幣政策導致市場波動加劇，金管局加強監察銀行的市場及流動性風險承擔。金管局進行審查，以檢視認可機構的流動性風險管理是否足夠，並聚焦於分散資金來源及集團內部流動性風險管理的制度及管控措施。此外，金管局亦進行審查，以評估認可機構的市場風險管理架構及財資業務管控措施的成效。
mt_raw: In light of increased market volatility resulting from further monetary tightening by major economies, the HKMA has strengthened its monitoring of banks’ market and liquidity risk exposures. The HKMA has conducted reviews to assess whether authorized institutions’ liquidity risk management is adequate, with a particular focus on diversifying funding sources and the systems and controls for managing intra-group liquidity risk. In addition, the HKMA has carried out reviews to evaluate the effectiveness of authorized institutions’ market risk management frameworks and controls over treasury business.

src_raw: 在鞏固香港作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐方面，多個範疇均取得理想進展，包括優化金管局與中國人民銀行之間現有的貨幣互換協議，以及金管局的人民幣流動資金安排，確保有足夠人民幣流動性，協助進一步推進離岸人民幣產品及市場發展；與中國人民銀行和證券及期貨事務監察委員會聯合宣布開展「互換通」；與證券及期貨事務監察委員會和香港交易及結算所有限公司合作推出雙櫃台莊家機制，推動人民幣計價股票在香港交易；以及金管局推出多年期計劃，進一步優化金融市場基建及發展債務工具中央結算系統成為亞洲區主要的國際中央證券託管平台。受惠於充足的人民幣流動性，並憑藉世界級的市場基建及內地與香港之間各個互聯互通機制，香港已成為內地資金進入國際市場及國際投資者投資於快速增長的內地市場的首選平台。
mt_raw: Significant progress was made in consolidating Hong Kong’s role as a global offshore RMB business hub across multiple areas. These included optimizing the existing currency swap agreement between the HKMA and the People’s Bank of China (PBOC), as well as the HKMA’s RMB liquidity arrangements, ensuring sufficient RMB liquidity to further promote the development of offshore RMB products and markets. The HKMA, together with the PBOC and the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), jointly announced the launch of "Swap Connect". In collaboration with the SFC and Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited (HKEX), the dual-counter market maker mechanism was introduced to facilitate the trading of RMB-denominated stocks in Hong Kong. The HKMA also launched a multi-year initiative to further enhance financial market infrastructure and develop the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU) into a major international central securities depository platform in Asia. Benefiting from ample RMB liquidity, world-class market infrastructure, and various market connectivity mechanisms between the Mainland and Hong Kong, the city has become the platform of choice for Mainland capital to access international markets and for international investors to invest in the rapidly growing Mainland market.

src_raw: 金管局繼續主動提升香港作為國際金融中心的競爭力。於11月，金管局舉辦「國際金融領袖投資峰會」，落實財政司司長在《2022至23年度財政預算案》宣布的計劃。峰會為期3日，雲集國際金融業界翹楚，就如何在各項不確定因素下把握機遇分享各自獨到的觀點。是項活動獲得極大迴響，吸引超過200位來自約120個國際金融機構的重量級嘉賓參加，充分體現全球金融界對香港的支持。
mt_raw: The HKMA continued to proactively enhance Hong Kong’s competitiveness as an international financial centre. In November, the HKMA hosted the "Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit," delivering on the plan announced by the Financial Secretary in the 2022-23 Budget. The three-day summit brought together leaders of the international financial community, who shared unique perspectives on seizing opportunities amid various uncertainties. The event received a warm response, attracting over 200 heavyweight guests from around 120 international financial institutions, fully demonstrating the global financial community’s support for Hong Kong.

src_raw: 香港進一步鞏固其作為離岸人民幣樞紐的地位，年內離岸人民幣業務穩健增長。香港在促進內地與國際金融市場之間的資金流方面發揮關鍵作用，香港與內地間的互聯互通機制被公認為國際投資者進入在岸資本市場及內地投資者配置離岸資產的首選渠道。在2022年，債券通「北向通」成交額佔境外投資者在中國銀行間債券市場整體成交額的61%。債券通「南向通」及「跨境理財通」自2021年開通以來一直運作暢順。金管局與中國人民銀行（人民銀行）和證券及期貨事務監察委員會（證監會）聯合宣布開展「互換通」，把香港與內地的金融合作進一步擴展至衍生品市場，並強化了香港作為主要離岸人民幣業務樞紐及風險管理中心的地位。金管局與人民銀行之間現有的貨幣互換協議於7月優化，是加強香港作為離岸人民幣業務樞紐的另一重要里程碑。
mt_raw: Hong Kong further consolidated its position as an offshore RMB hub, with robust growth in offshore RMB business during the year. Hong Kong played a key role in facilitating capital flows between Mainland and international financial markets, with its market connectivity mechanisms recognized as the preferred channel for international investors to access the onshore capital market and for Mainland investors to allocate to offshore assets. In 2022, Bond Connect (Northbound) accounted for 61% of total trading volume by overseas investors in China’s interbank bond market. Both Bond Connect (Southbound) and Wealth Management Connect have operated smoothly since their launch in 2021. The HKMA, together with the PBOC and the SFC, jointly announced the launch of Swap Connect, further extending financial cooperation between Hong Kong and the Mainland to the derivatives market and strengthening Hong Kong’s role as a major offshore RMB business hub and risk management centre. The optimization of the existing currency swap agreement between the HKMA and the PBOC in July marked another important milestone in reinforcing Hong Kong’s status as an offshore RMB business hub.

src_raw: 金管局繼續致力提升香港金融平台的競爭力。具體而言，為增加香港作為首選基金管理中心的吸引力，金管局與政府及金融業緊密合作，締造更便利的稅務及監管環境。在推動香港債券市場創新，以及鞏固香港作為區內綠色和可持續金融樞紐的地位方面，亦取得重大進展。與此同時，金管局加強市場推廣，向海外及內地持份者介紹香港的金融服務。
mt_raw: The HKMA remains committed to enhancing the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. Specifically, to increase Hong Kong’s attractiveness as a fund management centre of choice, the HKMA has worked closely with the government and the financial industry to create a more facilitative tax and regulatory environment. Significant progress has also been made in promoting innovation in Hong Kong’s bond market and consolidating its position as a regional hub for green and sustainable finance. Meanwhile, the HKMA has intensified market promotion efforts to introduce Hong Kong’s financial services to overseas and Mainland stakeholders.

src_raw:
金管局金融科技促進辦公室繼續與各銀行部門聯手實施「金融科技2025」策略，促進業界廣泛採用金融科技，並提升香港作為亞洲金融科技樞紐的地位。年內推行的主要措施包括：
- 促進合規科技應用及進行金融科技應用評估；
- 推動批發層面央行數碼貨幣的工作，致力改善跨境支付；

- 善用資源政策支持金融科技生態圈；
- 加強跨境金融科技合作；及
- 推動更廣泛使用快速支付系統「轉數快」。

src_raw: 金融基建的可靠及有效運作，是鞏固香港作為主要國際金融中心地位的關鍵。在2022年，處理銀行同業交易的4個即時支付結算系統（RTGS系統）、債務工具中央結算系統(CMU)及香港交易資料儲存庫均達到100%2的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。債券通「北向通」及「南向通」的交收服務維持暢順。年底時存放在CMU系統的債券中，未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額為12,075億港元，其他債券的未償還總額增至相當於15,733億港元，是2013年以來最高水平。
mt_raw: The reliable and efficient operation of financial market infrastructure is key to consolidating Hong Kong’s status as a major international financial centre. In 2022, the four real-time gross settlement (RTGS) systems for interbank transactions, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU), and the Hong Kong Trade Repository all achieved 100% system availability, exceeding the target level of 99.95%. Settlement services for both Northbound and Southbound Bond Connect remained smooth. By year-end, the outstanding amount of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes held in the CMU system stood at HK$1,207.5 billion, while the outstanding amount of other bonds increased to HK$1,573.3 billion, the highest level since 2013.

mt_raw: To promote the safety and efficiency of the local retail payment industry, the HKMA supervises six designated retail payment systems and regulates 17 licensed SVFs (of which four are issued by licensed banks) under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (the Payment Ordinance). src_raw: 在國際層面，金管局積極參與中央銀行領域的事務，在多個區內及國際委員會擔當領導角色。自2018年起，金管局在東亞及太平洋地區中央銀行會議(EMEAP)3轄下金融市場工作小組連任三屆主席。此外，金管局擔任巴塞爾銀行監管委員會（巴塞爾委員會）轄下政策及標準小組，以及金融穩定理事會轄下非銀行監察專家小組與金融創新網絡的聯席主席，另又領導金融穩定理事會轄下監察金融基準過渡相關監管事項的進度及作出跟進的小組。
mt_raw: At the international level, the HKMA actively participated in central banking affairs and played a leading role in several regional and international committees. Since 2018, the HKMA has served three consecutive terms as Chair of the EMEAP Financial Markets Working Group. In addition, the HKMA co-chairs the Policy and Standards Group under the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision, as well as the Non-bank Monitoring Experts Group and the Financial Innovation Network under the Financial Stability Board (FSB). The HKMA also leads the FSB group responsible for monitoring and following up on regulatory matters related to the transition of financial benchmarks.

src_raw: 繼財政司司長在《2022至23年度財政預算案》宣布，金管局於11月舉辦「國際金融領袖投資峰會」。峰會為期3日，反響熱烈，匯聚26位金融業界翹楚就應對經濟、金融、科技及地緣政治不穩定因素，以及如何把握當中的機遇分享獨到觀點和想法。峰會共有超過200位來自約120間全球金融機構的參加者，當中超過40間機構均由集團董事長或行政總裁親自出席。參與峰會的機構不乏位列全球最大的銀行、證券、資產管理、主權財富基金、私募股權與風險投資、對冲基金及保險公司等金融界別。
mt_raw: Following the announcement by the Financial Secretary in the 2022-23 Budget, the HKMA hosted the Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit in November. The three-day summit received an enthusiastic response, bringing together 26 industry leaders to share unique insights and perspectives on addressing economic, financial, technological, and geopolitical uncertainties, as well as on seizing the opportunities arising from these challenges. The summit attracted over 200 participants from around 120 global financial institutions, with more than 40 institutions represented by their group chairmen or chief executive officers. Participating institutions included some of the world’s largest banks, securities firms, asset managers, sovereign wealth funds, private equity and venture capital firms, hedge funds, and insurance companies.

src_raw: 香港致力鞏固其作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位，包括增強離岸流動性、進一步加強與內地金融市場的聯通，以及提升金融市場基建。年內人民幣業務，包括銀行存款、貿易結算、支付及離岸債券發行，繼續錄得穩健增長。在增強流動性、產品開發及擴大互聯互通機制方面，取得令人鼓舞的進展及成績。2022年國際結算銀行三年一度的外匯及衍生工具市場成交額調查結果，再次確認香港作為人民幣外匯中心的領先地位。
mt_raw: Hong Kong is committed to consolidating its position as the global offshore RMB business hub, including enhancing offshore liquidity, further strengthening connectivity with Mainland financial markets, and upgrading financial market infrastructure. During the year, RMB business—including bank deposits, trade settlement, payments, and offshore bond issuance—continued to record steady growth. Encouraging progress and results were achieved in enhancing liquidity, product development, and expanding market connectivity mechanisms. The 2022 triennial survey of foreign exchange and derivatives market turnover by the Bank for International Settlements once again confirmed Hong Kong’s leading position as an RMB foreign exchange centre.

terms: {'互換通': 'Swap Connect', '債券通': 'Bond Connect', '利率互換市場': 'interest rate swap markets', '北向交易': 'Northbound Trading', '風險管理中心': 'risk management centre'}
src_raw: 為完善債券通「北向通」的配套，並便利國際投資者管理內地債券投資相關的利率風險，香港與內地於7月宣布開展兩地利率互換市場互聯互通合作（「互換通」）。「互換通」初期會先開通北向交易，讓國際投資者透過香港與內地基礎設施機構之間的連接交易內地的利率互換產品，從而強化香港作為風險管理中心的地位。「互換通」籌備工作正在有序推進，以期盡快開通北向交易。金管局會繼續聯同有關當局及機構探索提供更多元化的風險管理工具，包括推出離岸國債期貨，進一步支持國際投資者投資內地債券市場。
mt_raw: To further enhance the supporting infrastructure of Bond Connect (Northbound) and facilitate international investors in managing interest rate risks associated with their investments in onshore bonds, Hong Kong and the Mainland announced in July the launch of mutual access between the two interest rate swap markets ("Swap Connect"). Swap Connect will initially commence with Northbound trading, enabling international investors to trade onshore interest rate swap products through the connectivity between Hong Kong and Mainland infrastructure institutions, thereby strengthening Hong Kong’s position as a risk management centre. Preparatory work for Swap Connect is progressing in an orderly manner, with the aim of launching Northbound trading as soon as possible. The HKMA will continue to work with relevant authorities and institutions to explore the provision of more diversified risk management tools, including the introduction of offshore government bond futures, to further support international investors’ participation in the Mainland bond market.

src_raw: 2022年的投資環境異常動盪，多種資產類別的價格同時下挫，不僅打破同時持有股票與債券可產生緩減風險作用的傳統投資智慧，更成為近半世紀以來唯一一次股票、債券及主要非美元貨幣匯兌同時錄得負回報的一年。在如此惡劣的投資環境下，外匯基金在2022年錄得投資回報率負4.5%。與年內大部分多元資產基金蒙受重大虧損的情況相比，外匯基金的表現反映金管局的多元化長期資產配置，以及因應外圍最新局勢變化而作出的防禦性部署及戰略性調整，有效減低市場風暴帶來的衝擊。
mt_raw: The investment environment in 2022 was exceptionally volatile, with prices across multiple asset classes declining simultaneously. This not only broke the traditional investment wisdom that holding both equities and bonds can provide a risk mitigation effect, but also marked the only year in nearly half a century in which equities, bonds, and major non-USD currencies all recorded negative returns at the same time. In such an adverse investment environment, the Exchange Fund (EF) recorded an investment return of -4.5% in 2022. Compared to the significant losses suffered by most multi-asset funds during the year, the performance of the EF reflects the Hong Kong Monetary Authority’s (HKMA) diversified long-term asset allocation, as well as its defensive deployment and strategic adjustments in response to the latest external developments, which effectively reduced the impact of market turmoil.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產配置於較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的目標資產配置與其他資產類別的配置，按審慎的風險管理原則及資產組合多元化策略一起制定。
mt_raw: To better manage risk and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA has prudently and progressively allocated part of the EF’s assets to more diversified asset classes, including emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities are held under the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held under the Long-Term Growth Portfolio. The target asset allocation of the Long-Term Growth Portfolio, together with the allocations to other asset classes, is determined in accordance with prudent risk management principles and a diversification strategy for the overall portfolio.

terms: {'倉盤': 'position', '回報': 'Return', '循跡誤差': 'tracking error', '戰略性偏離': 'tactical deviations', '戰略性資產配置': 'tactical asset allocation', '投資基準': 'investment benchmark', '投資程序': 'investment process', '投資組合經理': 'portfolio managers', '策略性資產配置': 'strategic asset allocation', '財政司司長': 'Financial Secretary', '資產配置': 'asset allocation'}
src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置以投資基準方式反映，亦即外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，透過戰略性的資產配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內管理倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment process of the EF is based on both strategic asset allocation and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation is reflected in the form of an investment benchmark, representing the long-term asset allocation that the EF may adopt to achieve its investment objectives. The EF uses the strategic allocation as a guideline and seeks to outperform the benchmark through tactical asset allocation. As a result, the actual allocation often deviates from the benchmark allocation (i.e., the strategic allocation), and the difference between the actual and benchmark allocations is referred to as the "tactical deviation." The Financial Secretary, after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, sets the investment benchmark and tracking error limit, while the HKMA is authorized to determine the tactical asset allocation and set the permissible range for tactical deviation. Portfolio managers may manage positions within the permissible range of tactical deviation to profit from short-term market movements.

src_raw: 金管局的外匯基金投資辦公室專責外匯基金的投資及相關風險管理職能。該辦公室職員負責直接管理外匯基金約70%的投資，包括整個支持組合及部分投資組合。該部分內部管理的投資組合包括不同的環球定息市場投資，並透過衍生工具執行外匯基金的宏觀風險管理策略。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund Investment Office of the HKMA is responsible for the investment and related risk management functions of the EF. Staff of the office directly manage about 70% of the EF’s investments, including the entire Backing Portfolio and part of the Investment Portfolio. The internally managed portion of the Investment Portfolio includes various global fixed income market investments, and macro risk management strategies for the EF are implemented through derivative instruments.

src_raw: 金管局相信透過適度強調負責任投資及考慮各項投資的可持續長期表現，可更有效達致外匯基金的投資目標，並且減低投資活動涉及的環境、社會及管治(ESG)相關風險。當ESG投資與其他投資項目的經風險調整長期收益相若時，金管局一般會按既定指導性原則優先考慮ESG投資，並已將ESG因素併入外匯基金的公開市場及私募市場的投資管理過程中。有關金管局的負責任投資框架及落實情況，詳見《二零二二年可持續發展報告》之「負責任投資」一章。
mt_raw: The HKMA believes that by appropriately emphasizing responsible investment and considering the sustainable long-term performance of each investment, it can more effectively achieve the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund and reduce environment, social, and governance (ESG)-related risks associated with investment activities. When the risk-adjusted long-term returns of ESG investments are comparable to those of other investment projects, the HKMA will generally give priority to ESG investments in accordance with established guiding principles, and has incorporated ESG factors into the investment management processes for both public and private markets of the Exchange Fund. For details on the HKMA’s responsible investment framework and its implementation, please refer to the chapter on “Responsible Investment” in the 2022 Sustainability Report.

src_raw: 公眾查詢服務是增進市民對金管局主要職能及運作認識的有效渠道，在2022年共處理9,952宗查詢。其中約有一半涉及銀行消費者事宜、銀行業政策及規例、紙幣與硬幣、金融基建及債券市場發展。當中較多查詢是關於硬幣收集計劃、銀行產品及服務、銀行業相關指引與通告，以及零售債券發行計劃。
mt_raw: The Public Enquiry Service is an effective channel for enhancing public understanding of the HKMA’s key functions and operations. In 2022, a total of 9,952 enquiries were handled. About half of these related to banking consumer issues, banking policies and regulations, banknotes and coins, financial infrastructure, and bond market development. The most common enquiries concerned the coin collection programme, banking products and services, banking guidelines and circulars, and the retail bond issuance programme.

mt_raw: The corporate website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 46,000 pages of information in English, traditional Chinese, and simplified Chinese, enabling the public to access the latest information about the HKMA. The website also contains the Register of Authorized Institutions and Local Representative Offices and the Register of Relevant Individuals (securities business) maintained under section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the Register of Stored Value Facility Licensees maintained under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance.

terms: {'中央銀行': 'central banking', '本地代表辦事處': 'local representative offices', '認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊': 'register of securities staff', '證券': 'securities'}
src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，是向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解的重要設施。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分。展覽館以互動方式介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。毗鄰展覽館的圖書館收藏超過26,000冊書籍、期刊及其他刊物，涵蓋香港貨幣、銀行業、金融和中央銀行事務等課題。圖書館亦按照《銀行業條例》第20條規定備存「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」及「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」，供公眾查閱。
mt_raw: The HKMA Information Centre, located on the 55th floor of Two International Finance Centre, is an important facility for introducing the work of the HKMA to the public and enhancing public understanding of monetary and banking matters. The Information Centre comprises two sections: an exhibition hall and a library. The exhibition hall uses interactive displays to introduce the work of the HKMA and the development of Hong Kong’s monetary and banking sectors; it also provides materials and exhibits for research on Hong Kong’s currency, banking, and financial affairs. Adjacent to the exhibition hall, the library houses over 26,000 books, periodicals, and other publications covering topics such as Hong Kong’s currency, banking, finance, and central banking. In accordance with section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, the library also maintains the Register of Authorized Institutions and Local Representative Offices and the Register of Relevant Individuals (securities business) for public inspection.
